'''Vuraj Marn''' was a [[Brosin]] resistance fighter and a member of the [[Brosin Underground]].<ref name="AIR" />

A faithful lieutenant of Brosin Underground leader [[Randle Clanse]], Marn led the largest of the four teams in the Brosin Underground (which must have included more than thirty men). Marn's team operated in the [[Reyno Valley|Reyno]] and [[Nihun Valley|Nihun valleys]], and they attempted to harass the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] industrial activities on [[Brosi]], particularly the [[Zinsian]] processing plants.<ref name="AIR" />

Due to the Underground's efficiency, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was afraid of the CSA increasing its security, which could have led to the discovery of Rebel underground agents, or of a Rebel ten-men cell led by [[Abil Vilorin]]. As of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Vilorin had been trying to make contact with Marn, but found it very difficult. Even then Vilorin doubted he could really convince Marn to change the Underground's plans.<ref name="AIR" />
